summary.key_theme: AI 需求帶動業務成長與股價強勁動能，但市場對短期暴漲後的估值合理性與股權稀釋風險保持審慎態度。

bullish.title: Fastly Stock Is Up 145% In The Past Month: What's Driving The Action? — Management says AI is becoming an increasing tailwind for the business
bullish.reason: 管理層明確指出 AI 需求成為業務成長的順風，這是推動股價在一個月內上漲 145 % 的核心基本面驅動力。

bullish.title: Fastly Stock Has Already Doubled This Year. Can It Keep Climbing?
bullish.reason: 探討股價翻倍後的持續成長潛力，反映市場對其長期競爭優勢的正面預期。

bullish.title: Fastly (FSLY) Is Up 5.75% in One Week: What You Should Know
bullish.reason: 針對動能投資者分析，確認短期股價走勢強勁，吸引市場資金關注。

bullish.title: Why Is Fastly (FSLY) Stock Soaring Today
bullish.reason: 解釋股價飆升的即時原因，強化市場對 Fastly 成長故事的信心。

bearish.title: Is Fastly’s (FSLY) ESOP Shelf Offering Quietly Redefining Its Long‑Term Equity Strategy?
bearish.reason: 探討員工持股計畫與架上發行可能帶來的股權稀釋風險，對現有股東權益構成潛在負面影響。

neutral.title: RBC Capital Keeps a Sector Perform Rating on Fastly, Inc. (FSLY)
neutral.reason: RBC Capital 維持「行業表現」評級，顯示分析師對該股在當前價位下的後續表現持觀望態度。

neutral.title: Assessing Fastly (FSLY) Valuation After A Sharp Short-Term Share Price Surge
neutral.reason: 針對股價急漲後的估值進行理性評估，提醒投資人注意過熱風險。

neutral.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Microsoft, NVIDIA, Fastly and Applied Optoelectronics
neutral.reason: 僅將 Fastly 列入投資組合亮點，未提供具體買賣建議，屬於中性市場觀察。

neutral.title: How Is The Market Feeling About Fastly Inc?
neutral.reason: 僅為市場情緒調查，未包含具體財務分析或重大事件影響。
